3.1. PositioningAccuracyandReliability
Positioning performance was evaluated at the representative test scenarios (S1–S3)
defined in Section 2.4.1. To comprehensively assess the proposed hybrid PPP‑B2b/RTK
+ MEMS strategy (Mode C), we benchmarked it against standalone PPP‑B2b (Mode A),
RTK‑only(ModeB),andthecommercialTrimbleCenterPointRTXservice(ModeD;Trim‑
ble Inc., Westminster, CO, USA) [57]. Network RTK (CORS/NTRIP‑dependent) was not
